description: Three-column testimonial cards with quotes and author details

default.quote: I've tried dozens of studios in the city. This is the first one where I feel like the teacher actually sees me. Every class feels personal, even in a group setting.
default.name: Margaux L.

default.quote: The online library saved my practice during a season of travel. The production quality is beautiful, and the classes are just as thoughtful as being there in person.
default.name: Suki R.

default.quote: I came for the workout and stayed for the way it changed how I breathe, sleep, and handle stress. It's the best hour of my week.
default.name: David K.
